title: ケッコウなオテマエデ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm passing by the park...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So, do you like it, Taiki?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it tastes good! Hoo boy has it got a bitter
kick to it, though!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Shucks, I'm tryin' ta think how them fancy folk'd
describe it. You sure brew a mighty fine "cuppa!"

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Why, thank you for saying so. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. That's right. Taiki and I decided to
have one at the park today.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: It's an outdoor tea party! I'm havin' a blast!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Which reminds me! I brought some donuts to
enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Betcha this'll solve that lil' bitterness problem!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sit tight while I go get 'em.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: SWEET MOTHER OF MERCY!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: A wasp! And a darn big one, too! AAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh... it's just a bee. Perhaps the sugary scent of
the donuts drew it here?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Help me, Grass! HEEEEELP!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I can take care of this. The best thing to do
is...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I can take care of this. The best thing to do
is...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, very true. As long as we stay still and don't
disturb the bee...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ooh... So, make like statues and we'll be safe?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, perfectly safe. So try to calm down, okay,
Taiki?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We follow Grass Wonder's instructions and sit
completely still.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzz...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wow! Graaaass! We ain't goners after all!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Back when I was a kiddo in the States, I was
taught not to mess around when a killer bee's in
town.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Bees tend to stay where it's sunny, so
why don't we move into the shade?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
A-all righty. Then let's shake a leg like we're
runnin' a race. Ready?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No, no, Taiki. We have to move slowly so as not
to disturb the bee.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! So we gotta be silent like a ninja?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, like that. Now is your chance to be a ninja,
Taiki. So, let's do our best. ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gotcha! I'm Ninja Shuttle, sneaky and silent!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Eeeeasy does it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The three of us make it to a safe spot.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Whew. Everything is okay now.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Back when I was a kiddo in the States, I was
taught not to mess around when a killer bee's in
town.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That was so scary! My knees are tremblin' even
now!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Bees in the States sometimes cause serious
incidents, so it's no surprise many children are
afraid of them.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's a fact! Grass's approach was wonderfully
perfect!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm glad you saw it that way. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Know thine enemy, as the saying goes. It's
precisely because they are scary that I learned as
much as I could about them.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There is nothing to fear as long as you have a
plan.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Grass! That's a tasty cuppa wisdom ya
poured!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm not sure I'd use that exact phrasing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's level-headed strength was on full
display this afternoon.
